# Líquen Events

> Líquen Events is a Portuguese event-planning company based in the Alentejo, organizing weddings, corporate events and private celebrations across Portugal since 2018. Tagline: "Organizamos eventos, eternizamos memórias." (We organize events, we make memories last.) Rated 5.0 from 56 reviews.

The site is Portuguese-first, with a full English mirror under `/en/`. Visitors can browse services, a photo gallery of past events, client testimonials, and request a tailored quote.

- Company: Líquen Events (founded 2018), Alentejo, Portugal
- Contact: liquen.alentejo@gmail.com · +351 919 259 820
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/liquen.events

## Main pages (Portuguese)

- [Início / Home](https://www.liquen-events.com/): Overview of Líquen Events, hero, featured services and testimonials.
- [Serviços](https://www.liquen-events.com/servicos): Weddings, corporate events and private celebrations, with dedicated pages per service.
- [Casamentos](https://www.liquen-events.com/servicos/casamentos): Wedding planning and coordination in the Alentejo and across Portugal.
- [Eventos Corporativos](https://www.liquen-events.com/servicos/eventos-corporativos): Corporate events, conferences and company celebrations.
- [Galeria](https://www.liquen-events.com/galeria): Photo gallery of real events organized by Líquen Events.
- [Sobre](https://www.liquen-events.com/sobre): About the company, its founder and approach.
- [Clientes](https://www.liquen-events.com/clientes): Clients and testimonials.
- [Contacto](https://www.liquen-events.com/contacto): Contact details and enquiry form.
- [Pedir Orçamento](https://www.liquen-events.com/orcamento): Request a personalized quote for an event.

## English mirror

- [Home (EN)](https://www.liquen-events.com/en): English version of the site.
- [Services (EN)](https://www.liquen-events.com/en/servicos): Services in English.
- [Gallery (EN)](https://www.liquen-events.com/en/galeria): Event photo gallery.
- [Contact (EN)](https://www.liquen-events.com/en/contacto): Contact and enquiry form in English.

## Legal

- [Política de Privacidade](https://www.liquen-events.com/privacidade): Privacy policy (GDPR / RGPD).
- [Termos e Condições](https://www.liquen-events.com/termos): Terms and conditions.
